title: Harris Essentials Decorating Set 11 Pieces
features: The Essentials decorating set includes the all the tools you need for those interior walls and ceilings and interior woodwork decoating projects
A handy sanding block for preparing your surfaces.
A 9 inch roller set for painting large areas such as interior walls and ceilings with Emulsion paint
A 4 inch mini roller set with an emulsion sleeve and a gloss sleeve means you can paint smaller areas of walls and ceilings and woodwork.
3 x paint brushes for the detail and cutting in.
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Complete Decorating Set For Painting Walls, Ceilings and Woodwork Whats Included Contents 1 x 9" Roller Tray 1 x 9" Roller Frame 1 x 9" Emulsion Roller Sleeve 1 x 4" Roller Tray 1 x 4" Roller Frame 1 x 4" Emulsion Roller Sleeve & 1 x 4 inch Gloss Roller Sleeve 2 x Emulsion Paint Brushes & 1 x Gloss Paint Brush 1 x Sanding Block Ideal for a for a project This complete decorating set from Harris will give a good finish when painting walls & ceilings and interior woodwork. The set is perfect for a painting and decorating project, giving you the tools you need to get the job done. The kit includes rollers and brushes suited for use with gloss and emulsion paints as well as a sanding block that will help prepare a surface for paint. Extend Your Reach Looking to extend your reach? Simply attach the roller frames to a Harris Extension Pole with a push fit attachment. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎3 Pack Paint Brushes, 9" & 4" Roller Frames, 9" & 4" Roller Sleeves, 9" & 4" Roller Trays, Sanding Block
